reason: Primary check target: required/forbidden patterns, immutability of Span/Trace/SpanContext, and correct Builder usage on Agent/Graph.
Verify the failure path keeps the original exception type/stack and that the runtimeId is exposed only via a suppressed marker + extraction API, not a wrapping exception.
Verify the new trace/ package lives in the correct location and that directory-structure.md + index.md were updated to document it.
Verify no logging framework was introduced and that recording-layer exceptions do not leak into the main execution flow.
Verify tool-call handling correctness in RecordingCallback and that parallel tools produce exactly one tool span each with the right parent.
